name: devhub
description: DevHub — discover and launch side projects. Vue 3 + Express full-stack.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c amber,cyan "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build:prod: npm install --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client && npm install --prefix server && npm run db:generate --prefix server
scripts.setup: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client && npm run db:push --prefix server && npm run seed --prefix server

author: moadh704
